name: D+Q diabetic kidney disease human senescent-cell biomarker pilot
summary: Open-label phase 1 pilot in which 9 participants with diabetic kidney disease received oral dasatinib 100 mg plus quercetin 1000 mg for 3 days, with adipose, skin, and blood biomarker samples collected before treatment and 11 days after the course.

provenance.note: Abstract reports N=9, 3 days of dasatinib 100 mg plus quercetin 1000 mg, and pre/post tissue and blood collection 11 days after treatment completion.
